channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 31st March
item.description:
Dumped recycling and rubbish not collected

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): East Bank, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti along footpath, 31st March
item.description:
There has been some new graffiti added along the footpath. We have found that if it is not removed, it encourages more to be added. There is some green graffiti in the location on the map (on the fence post) but there are also sporadic other tags on fences and back gates along the footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodlodge Gardens, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet more flytipping on my corner, 31st March
item.description:
Multiple shelves and chair dumped in the last couple of days. MOBILE ENFORCEMENT ON FLYTIPPING URGENTLY NEEDED IN STAMFORD HILL NOW. It is disgusting around here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunsmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the carriageway between M11 junction 4 and junction 5, 31st March
item.description:
There is a lot of litter between the junction 5 and junction 4 on the M11
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Chigwell, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poop outside no 10 again, 31st March
item.description:
Dog poop on pavement, same place as reported last week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Hayes Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on signpost, 31st March
item.description:
Graffiti has been added to the back of this signpost

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Romney Drive, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LBB 3 very large trees overhanging our garden, 31st March
item.description:
Please can you cut back your 3 very large LBB trees that are on the LBB green next to our house. They overhang our garden as marked in the photos. One large tree branch is going to be hitting our roof once it grows leaves this year. The amount of bird excrement and leaf fall is significant which covers our entire front and back garden and the bird excrement falls onto our outhouse roof and all over the fences and garden and car. There is a large tree root in our garden that has lifted the pathway, this root seems to be prior to us living here but your trees should not be allowed to grow this huge, causing this many long term problems. Gutters get blocked by huge amounts of leaf fall and the trees are blocking light into our garden. There is an endless list of problems. Please cut back your trees this year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Gravelwood Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter around food bins on Law Street, 31st March
item.description:
There are litter on the bins belonging to Bad Moon Cafe. The litter has been on it for four days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Law Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray paint left and howls in path, 31st March
item.description:
Works carried out today just wondering if the spray paint on the path will be removed? The pot holes in the path have gotten bigger and the path has been left in an unsatisfactory state. Really requires attention. We have jus received our council tax bill and it is astronomical and then the outside of our house has been left like this. Can you please advise.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Bins on pavements & rubbish bags dumped regularly next to it, 31st March
item.description:
I've reported this multiple times, you said months ago it was illegal & bins would be removed . These bins continue to over flow and cause dumping of other bags alongside which get ripped & debris often food & nappies strewn across pavement & road . It's already a dumping ground for people illegally parking & chucking their take away containers daily plus urinating up the wall . This further encouraging waste to be dumped .you've not replied to my last 4 attempts to get these unsightly bins removed . They are there 24 hrs 7 days a week and are causing obstruction, fly tipping & debris on the pavement . PLEASE DO SOMETHIMG ABOUT THIS & LOCATE THE BINS IN AN APPROXIMATE PLACE ! bins are from the pizza restaurant on bourne road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weir Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Laughing gas cannisters on Curtis St, 31st March
item.description:
Laughing gas cannisters in corner in front of Garages where Curtis St meets Willow Walk. Has been there for weeks. Second time reporting, please clear 2 gas cannisters as well in front of Games Court/Football Pitch entrance on Setchell Way where it meets Willow Walk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willow Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste bin used for rubbish, 31st March
item.description:
I reported this already. You took away two of the three garden waste bins. The third one is pictured. Outside 107 Foulden Road, this garden waste bin also needs to be removed. It is full of general rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 31st March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blanche Downe, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pathways, 31st March
item.description:
Butt's wood again. Think picker came, as SOME litter picked, but now a bag of rubbish torn open by animals i presume, but picker still only pucker up on main path way, missed other stuff.? The waters been cleaned of cans, bottles, tgank you very much but still loads if other rubbish there, bikes gone agsin thanks. Beer cans mostly gone that were on steps of viewing point, but loads more just in the tree area , bushes which id had thought they could see blatantly and may have took few mins to remove, but seems not!! Maybe thats another perdons job then? Like jobs worth 🤣 Sorry couldn't resist. Aldo tge cans on grass still there, if walk along path towards gallion reach doctors , the exit from butt's wood, before bridge, bern there 3 weeks now. Sorry but picker seems only to do main path from hawksmoor school entrance. Sorry.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bentham Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car under tarpaulin in Kelmore Grove, 31st March
item.description:
This car has been here for some years under a silver cover. It's not taxed or MOTed and is occupying a parking space that is badly needed by the residents. Please remove this car.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Kelmore Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 31st March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed camera knocked off, exposed wires, 31st March
item.description:
Who is responsible for speed cameras on your network?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coleridge Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle at the Days End of Annandale Road, 31st March
item.description:
Untaxed Navy blue punto has been seemingly dumped at the Days Lane end of Annandale Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Annandale Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip AGAIN at entrance to clifden mews, 31st March
item.description:
Multiple items of disused furniture dumped at the entrance to clifden mews and on the tree adjacent on clifden road. This is a repeat area and needs cctv monitoring to catch offenders.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clifden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left every day people tripping falling even disabled people and children, 31st March
item.description:
What's wrong is the council are not doing anything to punish the culprits as there's a camera along the street everyone is had enough amd it devalues property. It seems if there was a knife crime then action with camera for police. This was reported yesterday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
